summary: Initial QA evaluation of the e-commerce MVP requirements and architectural design.
issues_found: No detailed test cases provided for functional testing.
Architecture document lacks specific integration points despite user instruction to avoid integrations.
recommendations: Develop comprehensive test cases covering product view, user management, and shopping cart functionalities.
Clarify the architecture document to explicitly state that no external integrations will be included in this MVP.
Review the source code for adherence to the architectural design and requirements.
